name: gender-trouble-feminism-and-the-subversion-of-identity
description: Judith Butler's 'Gender Trouble: Feminism and the Subversion of Identity' — the foundational text of queer theory. Butler argues that gender is not a fixed identity but a performative act. Challenging the sex/gender distinction and the heterosexual matrix that organizes desire. A radical rethinking of identity, power, and subversion.
